headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Apple Jumps On Earnings, Sandisk Skids; Stock Market At High
summary: Apple, Sandisk and Roku were key movers after the stock market hit new highs amid huge earnings and lower oil prices.

headline: Jim Cramer Says “Corning Flew Too Close and Had Its Icarus Moment”
summary: Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s Mad Money radar as he discussed the recent sell-off in AI-related stocks. Highlighting the stock’s recent parabolic move, Cramer said: Let’s go back to the rain metaphor for a moment, though. We’re on the cusp of the big four tech earnings, Amazon, Alphabet, Meta, and […]

headline: Corning Announces Quarterly Dividend
summary: CORNING, N.Y., April 30, 2026--Corning Incorporated’s (NYSE: GLW) Board of Directors today declared a quarterly dividend of $0.28 per share. The dividend will be payable on June 29, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 29, 2026.

headline: NETGEAR Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y
summary: NTGR beats Q1 EPS and revenue estimates despite a 2% sales dip, as enterprise ProAV switches and recurring subscribers help cushion results.

headline: Is Corning Stock A Buy At 50 Times Earnings?
summary: Corning (GLW) reported Q1 2026 core sales of $4.35 billion, representing an 18% year-over-year increase. The core insight hiding beneath this headline beat is how entirely the AI-driven acceleration is offsetting the more modest growth currently seen in the company's traditional Glass Innovations segment.

headline: The London Company Income Equity Q1 2026: Winners, Laggards And Key Trades
summary: The London Company Income Equity portfolio returned 4.4% (4.2% net) during the quarter vs. a 4.2% decrease in the Russell 1000 Index. Read more here.

headline: Corning stock falls as its story gets more complicated
summary: Corning (GLW) stock pulled back about 1% after earnings, following a massive run in which shares gained roughly 250% over the past year. The reaction looks odd at first glance because Optical demand tied to AI data centers is accelerating, margins are expanding, and Corning just locked in two new ...
